resources.string: A newer version is ready in Google Play.
The update has finished downloading. Restart the app to install the latest version.
The Smoke Analytics tile, on your wrist
Install the tile on %1$s to track smokes and glance at today\'s count without picking up your phone.
After installing, swipe to the tiles carousel on the watch and add Smoke Analytics.
Review smoking frequency and the places where smoking clusters show up.
See where repeated smoking clusters show up across the selected period.
Pulling repeated smoking areas for the selected period and rebuilding the geographic side of Analytics.
Enable location tracking in You to unlock repeated-area detection, cluster insights, and the geographic side of Analytics.
The rest of the product still works, but this destination needs location-linked history to become useful.
There is not enough location-linked history for this period yet. Track a few smokes with location enabled to start building repeated areas here.
Once enough entries accumulate, the app will cluster repeated areas automatically.
The geographic clusters could not be refreshed right now. Keep the selected period and try again in a moment.
This does not affect the rest of your tracked history or analytics.
Most frequent area for the selected period.
Repeated clusters usually point to routines worth protecting or interrupting, especially around commute, breaks, or end-of-day transitions.
